item.title: DataVare EML To PST Converter [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: DataVare EML To PST Converter [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: datavare01
item.itunes:summary:
DataVare EML To PST Converter
(Utilities)
Download DataVare EML to PST Converter to export single or multiple EML files tp PST at once in bulk with attachments. It supports all email support email clients such as Outlook Express, Thunderbird, Windows Live Mail, and other email clients' data converted into Outlook PST file format. Advanced technology was used in the development of this useful tool to ensure that attachments, sophisticated text formatting, and folder structure are always maintained. Users can quickly get valuable mail using this solution, which they can convert to PST or other specified formats. In addition, it functions with big databases with ease and is compatible with every version of Windows. Also all Outlook versions up to 2021, and offer a free trial pack to convert a few eml files to pst free.

[read more]
item.description:

(Utilities)
Download DataVare EML to PST Converter to export single or multiple EML files tp PST at once in bulk with attachments. It supports all email support email clients such as Outlook Express, Thunderbird, Windows Live Mail, and other email clients' data converted into Outlook PST file format. Advanced technology was used in the development of this useful tool to ensure that attachments, sophisticated text formatting, and folder structure are always maintained. In addition, it functions with big databases with ease and is compatible with every version of Windows. Also all Outlook versions up to 2021, and offer a free trial pack to convert a few eml files to pst free.

item.content:encoded:
DataVare EML To PST Converter
(Utilities)
Download DataVare EML to PST Converter to export single or multiple EML files tp PST at once in bulk with attachments. It supports all email support email clients such as Outlook Express, Thunderbird, Windows Live Mail, and other email clients' data converted into Outlook PST file format. Advanced technology was used in the development of this useful tool to ensure that attachments, sophisticated text formatting, and folder structure are always maintained. Users can quickly get valuable mail using this solution, which they can convert to PST or other specified formats. In addition, it functions with big databases with ease and is compatible with every version of Windows. Also all Outlook versions up to 2021, and offer a free trial pack to convert a few eml files to pst free.

item.title: OCTWING [System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS)]
item.itunes:title: OCTWING [System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS)]
item.itunes:author: revwhiteshadow
item.itunes:summary:
OCTWING
(System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS))
The OctWing Magisk module is a powerful tool designed to enhance your gaming experience in multiplayer shooting games. Its primary objective is to maximize aim assist, providing players with a competitive edge by improving their aiming accuracy. Additionally, this module addresses the limitations of gyro controls, optimizing the gyro's performance for a smoother and more precise gaming experience. OctWing is an invaluable resource for gamers seeking to elevate their skill levels and dominate in multiplayer shooting games.

[read more]
item.description:
OCTWING
(System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS))
The OctWing Magisk module is a powerful tool designed to enhance your gaming experience in multiplayer shooting games. Its primary objective is to maximize aim assist, providing players with a competitive edge by improving their aiming accuracy. Additionally, this module addresses the limitations of gyro controls, optimizing the gyro's performance for a smoother and more precise gaming experience. OctWing is an invaluable resource for gamers seeking to elevate their skill levels and dominate in multiplayer shooting games.

[read more]
item.content:encoded:
OCTWING
(System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS))
The OctWing Magisk module is a powerful tool designed to enhance your gaming experience in multiplayer shooting games. Its primary objective is to maximize aim assist, providing players with a competitive edge by improving their aiming accuracy. Additionally, this module addresses the limitations of gyro controls, optimizing the gyro's performance for a smoother and more precise gaming experience. OctWing is an invaluable resource for gamers seeking to elevate their skill levels and dominate in multiplayer shooting games.

[read more]

item.title: Memory Card Data Rescue Utility [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Memory Card Data Rescue Utility [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: repairmemorycard
item.itunes:summary:
Memory Card Data Rescue Utility
(Utilities)
Memory card data recovery software support all types of memory cards readers to access the memory card on your PC. Compact flash memory card data restoration software retrieves lost or formatted digital picture, audio, video, text and image from corrupted memory card of all sizes (32GB, 64GB, 128GB and 256GB etc). Compact flash card data salvage application repair files even if Drive Not Detected message is displayed on your PC. Memory card data recovery software supports Windows 11, 10, 8, 7, XP and Vista. Memory card data recovery software is used to restore all digital files including jpeg, mpeg, bmp, gif, 3gp, ppt, and other supported storage media. Memory card data recovery software can be used as forensic tool for investigation use. Memory card files restoration utility retrieves all sorts of encrypted audio, video, pictures, text data from undetected USB flash drive. Memory card data resurgence software recovers photographs, digital images and music files in easiest way. Memory card data recovery software is easy to operate by non technical person. Memory card data retrieval software provides easy and fastest recovery functionality. Memory card data recovery utility is reliable solution for recovery which you lost due to accidental formation of multimedia memory card. Memory card data retrieval software recovers incorrect data fastly.FEATURES-* Memory card data recovery software is very easy to install and run.* Memory card data salvage software information can be handled by compressing and storing it in a tree-structured full text searchable database for instant access of any information.* Software has interactive GUI and support all windows OS.* Memory card data retrieval is non destructive read only utility to recover audio, videos and files.

[read more]
item.description:
Memory Card Data Rescue Utility
(Utilities)
Memory card data recovery software support all types of memory cards readers to access the memory card on your PC. Compact flash memory card data restoration software retrieves lost or formatted digital picture, audio, video, text and image from corrupted memory card of all sizes (32GB, 64GB, 128GB and 256GB etc). Compact flash card data salvage application repair files even if Drive Not Detected message is displayed on your PC. Memory card data recovery software supports Windows 11, 10, 8, 7, XP and Vista. Memory card data recovery software is used to restore all digital files including jpeg, mpeg, bmp, gif, 3gp, ppt, and other supported storage media. Memory card data recovery software can be used as forensic tool for investigation use. Memory card data retrieval software recovers incorrect data fastly.FEATURES-* Memory card data recovery software is very easy to install and run.* Memory card data salvage software information can be handled by compressing and storing it in a tree-structured full text searchable database for instant access of any information.* Software has interactive GUI and support all windows OS.* Memory card data retrieval is non destructive read only utility to recover audio, videos and files.

[read more]
item.content:encoded:
Memory Card Data Rescue Utility
(Utilities)
Memory card data recovery software support all types of memory cards readers to access the memory card on your PC. Compact flash memory card data restoration software retrieves lost or formatted digital picture, audio, video, text and image from corrupted memory card of all sizes (32GB, 64GB, 128GB and 256GB etc). Compact flash card data salvage application repair files even if Drive Not Detected message is displayed on your PC. Memory card data recovery software supports Windows 11, 10, 8, 7, XP and Vista. Memory card data recovery software is used to restore all digital files including jpeg, mpeg, bmp, gif, 3gp, ppt, and other supported storage media. Memory card data recovery software can be used as forensic tool for investigation use. Memory card files restoration utility retrieves all sorts of encrypted audio, video, pictures, text data from undetected USB flash drive. Memory card data resurgence software recovers photographs, digital images and music files in easiest way. Memory card data recovery software is easy to operate by non technical person. Memory card data retrieval software provides easy and fastest recovery functionality. Memory card data recovery utility is reliable solution for recovery which you lost due to accidental formation of multimedia memory card. Memory card data retrieval software recovers incorrect data fastly.FEATURES-* Memory card data recovery software is very easy to install and run.* Memory card data salvage software information can be handled by compressing and storing it in a tree-structured full text searchable database for instant access of any information.* Software has interactive GUI and support all windows OS.* Memory card data retrieval is non destructive read only utility to recover audio, videos and files.

item.title: mdqtee [Text Editors]
item.itunes:title: mdqtee [Text Editors]
item.itunes:author: md2222
item.itunes:summary:
mdqtee
(Text Editors)
mdqtee (MD QTextEdit Example) - rich text editor based on Qt QTextEdit example.
Feautures:

- Can work with files in MAFF format. All document files in one zip-file.
- In HTML-format all resource files copies to [name]_files directory.
- You can insert (attach) various files. Video, PDF, ...
- You can copy entire articles from the internet, images will be downloaded. Drag-and-drop image from browser will download it.
- Export formats: PDF, EPUB 2, Markdown, Plain text, ODT (Qt feature, not good).
- For links click use Ctrl. Links are opened by system applications.
- Anchors.
- You can replace image with its link or thumbnail.
- Table actions. Tables can be with % column width. Use Shift+ when create it.
- [+], [-] buttons can resize selected image. One at a time. Can resize table column width for table created with % width.
- Actions with Ctrl key for scroll bar. (Scroll by pages, Scroll to top, Scroll to bottom)
- File browser panel.
- Data file path as command line argument. It allows you to open a data file from file manager and make mdqtee as default (for maff files, for example).

Known issues: on some images the special context menu items opens on the right half only. Left half overlaped by the previous fragment.
[read more]
item.description:
mdqtee
(Text Editors)
mdqtee (MD QTextEdit Example) - rich text editor based on Qt QTextEdit example.
Feautures:

- Can work with files in MAFF format. All document files in one zip-file.
- In HTML-format all resource files copies to [name]_files directory.
- You can insert (attach) various files. Video, PDF, ...
- You can copy entire articles from the internet, images will be downloaded. Drag-and-drop image from browser will download it.
- Export formats: PDF, EPUB 2, Markdown, Plain text, ODT (Qt feature, not good).
- For links click use Ctrl. Links are opened by system applications.
- Anchors.
- You can replace image with its link or thumbnail.
- Table actions. Tables can be with % column width. Use Shift+ when create it.
- [+], [-] buttons can resize selected image. One at a time. Can resize table column width for table created with % width.
- Actions with Ctrl key for scroll bar. (Scroll by pages, Scroll to top, Scroll to bottom)
- File browser panel.
- Data file path as command line argument. It allows you to open a data file from file manager and make mdqtee as default (for maff files, for example).

Known issues: on some images the special context menu items opens on the right half only. Left half overlaped by the previous fragment.
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
mdqtee
(Text Editors)
mdqtee (MD QTextEdit Example) - rich text editor based on Qt QTextEdit example.
Feautures:

- Can work with files in MAFF format. All document files in one zip-file.
- In HTML-format all resource files copies to [name]_files directory.
- You can insert (attach) various files. Video, PDF, ...
- You can copy entire articles from the internet, images will be downloaded. Drag-and-drop image from browser will download it.
- Export formats: PDF, EPUB 2, Markdown, Plain text, ODT (Qt feature, not good).
- For links click use Ctrl. Links are opened by system applications.
- Anchors.
- You can replace image with its link or thumbnail.
- Table actions. Tables can be with % column width. Use Shift+ when create it.
- [+], [-] buttons can resize selected image. One at a time. Can resize table column width for table created with % width.
- Actions with Ctrl key for scroll bar. (Scroll by pages, Scroll to top, Scroll to bottom)
- File browser panel.
- Data file path as command line argument. It allows you to open a data file from file manager and make mdqtee as default (for maff files, for example).

Known issues: on some images the special context menu items opens on the right half only. Left half overlaped by the previous fragment.
[read more]

item.title: Blackberry Bulk SMS Marketing Software [Internet Apps]
item.itunes:title: Blackberry Bulk SMS Marketing Software [Internet Apps]
item.itunes:author: bulksmsmobile
item.itunes:summary:
Blackberry Bulk SMS Marketing Software
(Internet Apps)
Blackberry Bulk Sms Marketing Software: One thing that every blackberry mobile user should always try - Safe and reliable mass text messaging software provides facility to broadcast thousands of text messages from blackberry mobile connected via PC to several mobile phone users. Versatile genius mass text messenger automatically imports all contact numbers from phonebook directory and individually send text messages to each people in just one click.

[read more]

[read more]

Versatile genius mass text messenger automatically imports all contact numbers from phonebook directory and individually send text messages to each people in just one click.

item.title: Bulk SMS Marketing Application [Internet Apps]
item.itunes:title: Bulk SMS Marketing Application [Internet Apps]
item.itunes:author: bulksmsmobile
item.itunes:summary:
Bulk SMS Marketing Application
(Internet Apps)
Bulk SMS Marketing application has ability to broadcast new product launched and business details on group of phone numbers. Download Bulk SMS Marketing program from www.bulksmsmobilemarketing.com informs business users about festival offer and new schemes without any external gateway. Simple to download bulk SMS provider utility is capable to easily work with collection Unicode text messaging program without any external help. Advance bulk SMS tool helps business user to transmit product price updates in Unicode format from computer system via GSM technology based mobile phone device. Advance usable Bulk SMS providing tool is fully capable of sending text messages in Unicode character on GSM technology based mobile numbers. High quality Bulk SMS providing application is used to broadcast all types of messages in Unicode character including business detail, product promotional details without external guidance. Accessible Bulk SMS Marketing utility has ability to transmit instant notification messages to personal or group of mobile numbers without external help. Advance technical Bulk SMS Marketing application is used to deliver all types of message and notification on GSM based mobile numbers. Effective text messaging application facilitates you to easily send sms on GSM based mobile numbers and suitable for business organizations and information technology industries. Comprehensive Bulk SMS Marketing utility easily send text message and save sent messages as templates for further use. Feature * Bulk SMS provider tool does not need ant technical skills to transmit messages on group of mobile numbers without internet connection. * Group text messaging software helps you to send all types of text messages in Unicode format from computer to global mobile network without professional help. * Bulk SMS providing tool is designed with GUI interface that facilitates you to broadcast business details from notebook to mobile numbers.

[read more]
